subject: SDN-C Multi-site High-availability - Auto-failover
commit_message:
SDN-C Multi-site High-availability - Auto-failover

Change-Id: I4e028b31ce7a60154d2c04c63431c5ea996de8f8
Signed-off-by: Mohammadreza Pasandideh <mohammadreza.pasandideh@amdocs.com>
Issue-ID: SDNC-213

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

(2 comments)

prom docker image version needs to be updated

Patch Set 5: Code-Review+1

James MacNider also provided +1 as he had successfully tested a full deployment with this patch.

Patch Set 5:

(3 comments)

Thanks for the explanation regarding chart location not under charts/.
Few more comments while testing.

Patch Set 5:

> what does PROM stand for?

It stands for 'Policy-dRiven Ownership Management'.
